entry.note: <L>107<pc>1,2<k1>aMh<k2>aMh<h>1<e>1 <hom>1.</hom> <s>aMh</s> ¦ (<ab>cf.</ab> √ <s>aNG</s>) <ab>cl.</ab> 1. <ab>Ā.</ab> <s>aMhate</s>, to go, set out, commence, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to approach, <ls>L.</ls>; <div n="to"/> <ab>cl.</ab> 10. <ab>P.</ab> <s>aMhayati</s>, to send, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to speak, <ls>Bhaṭṭ.</ls>; <div n="to"/>to shine, <ls>L.</ls><info verb="genuineroot" cp="1Ā,10P"/> <LEND>

<L>47<pc>1-0006<k1>aMh<k2>aMh<h>1 1. {#aMh#}¦, {#a/Mhate, AnaMhe, aMhitA, aMhizyate, AMhizwa#} . {%Gehen.%} {#AMhizwa#} <ls>BHAṬṬ. 3,25.</ls> <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">15,28.</ls> {#aMhitAsmahe#} <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">22,17.</ls> {#AnaMhe cAntikaM pituH#} <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">14,51.</ls> {#AnaMhire 'driM prati#} <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">3,46.</ls> {#AMhizAtAmASramam#} <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">4,4.</ls> {#AMhizata saMgrAmam#} <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">15,74.</ls> — Caus. {#aMha/yati#} {%schicken%}: {#tamAYjihanmETilayajYaBUmim#} <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">2,40.</ls> <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">15,75.</ls> — Desid. {#aYjihizate#} {%gehen wollen%}: {#prAcyamAYjihizAMcakre#} <ls n="BHAṬṬ.">14,15.</ls> <div n="v">— Vgl. {#aMhri#} und {#aNGri#}, für die die Wurzel von den Grammatikern vielleicht erst geschaffen worden ist. <LEND>
